tasks.label: restart-backend-fixed
tasks.command: pkill -9 -f 'backend/main' 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; PYTHONPATH=. .venv/bin/python -W ignore backend/main.py run > /tmp/be_fixed.log 2>&1

tasks.label: backend-v2
tasks.command: pkill -9 -f 'backend/main' 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; PYTHONPATH=. .venv/bin/python -W ignore backend/main.py run > /tmp/be_v2.log 2>&1

tasks.label: backend-gemini
tasks.command: pkill -9 -f 'backend/main' 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; PYTHONPATH=. .venv/bin/python -W ignore backend/main.py run > /tmp/be_gemini.log 2>&1

tasks.label: backend-final
tasks.command: pkill -9 -f 'backend/main' 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; PYTHONPATH=. .venv/bin/python -W ignore backend/main.py run
